title: Emily — letter to self, asymmetry + elite self-talk (Aug 14 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • Mid-August 2025 letter Yahir writes to himself about Emily — six weeks before the Austin move. Names the asymmetry directly: "Do you like Emily, but she likes you more — yes."
  • Frames the choice as compelling-future vs. shallow-short-term: "Do you see a future with Emily that is compelling — no. Is the short term romance ok — it's fine but it's harmful at times and leaves things in the shallow." What he wants instead: "a powerful and compelling relationship where you can express your love and gratitude for her."
  • Self-typing he tries on for the asymmetry: "I am a masculine, strong, dumb, testosterone man that she likes. She is a silly, alt, soft girl that I have become fond of." — "I don't see Emily the way she wants to be seen."
  • Pivots into a pure elite self talk manifesto in the same doc: "I know I am great. I know I am elite. I will make it. Failure is death. Imaginary walls exist everywhere, they don't matter. I am prolific. I am abundant." The same grammar as the April 2024 rebirth call.
  • Closes on a pillar-for-others role identity — "I am a pillar for those who can't, for those who couldn't... the children dealt a losing hand, the people trapped in their small corners of possibility, those in the local maxima." This is the local-maxima-as-trap framing that recurs in Yahir's why-I-leave-comfort writing.

Beats

  • The letter is literally re-written twice in the doc — first draft, then a re-typed cleaner version of the same elite-self-talk paragraph. He's rehearsing the cadence, not just venting.
  • "You get one shot at this, but this is infinite" — the contradiction he ends on, deliberately.
  • Sits in the the emily arc timeline as the moment Yahir acknowledges the asymmetry but does not end the relationship; the eventual cohabitation question is still live in Nov 24 Get a Grip ("I want to know if Emily should live with me") and recurs in the 2026 trip-planning docs.

Privacy

  • Emily-Stevens is an existing vault entity. Letter is private self-talk, no third-party PII surfaced.

Relations

  • emily stevens · the emily arc
  • 2024 04 01 Untitled document — same self-talk grammar, 16 months earlier
  • 2025 11 24 Get a Grip — the cohabitation question still live
  • burn bright die young — adjacent intensity-as-virtue concept
  • lynchpin life companion — the partner-decision frame this letter operates inside
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026
